scripts.build:linux: bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 ./src/index.ts --outfile dist/parallax-linux && rm -rf dist/runtime && cp -r runtime dist/runtime
scripts.build:mac: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 ./src/index.ts --outfile dist/parallax-macos && rm -rf dist/runtime && cp -r runtime dist/runtime
scripts.build:win: bun build --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 ./src/index.ts --outfile dist/parallax-windows.exe && rm -rf dist/runtime && cp -r runtime dist/runtime
scripts.build: bun run build:linux && bun run build:mac
